pi_items.source: Task specification in task.json description - confirmed to be the target playlist name to create
Chinook SQLite database Genre table (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database): Genre ID 1 is named 'Rock' exactly. Verified by querying Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite.
Chinook database analysis confirms the criteria is Milliseconds > 300000 (strictly greater than). This equals 5 minutes. Verified in export_result.sh parsing logic which uses: tdata['ms'] > 300000.

Chinook database analysis confirms that 347 Rock tracks match ALL criteria: Genre='Rock' (ID=1), Duration > 300000ms, and Composer IS NOT NULL and non-empty. The export_result.sh verifier explicitly checks: (composer != 'NULL' and composer != ''). This is enforced in the track filtering logic.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real Chinook Database (public dataset from lerocha/chinook-database GitHub repository, 984KB SQLite file). All metadata claims are verified: The target genre is exactly 'Rock' (GenreId=1 in the Chinook database), with 1297 total Rock tracks in the database. The duration threshold is 300000 milliseconds (5 minutes), and the composer requirement is strictly enforced (non-NULL, non-empty Composer field). The database query confirms 347 Rock tracks match all criteria (Genre='Rock' AND Duration > 300000ms AND Composer NOT NULL). The playlist name 'Epic Rock' is the target for agent creation.
